content:
🚀 glance | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a personalized, self-hosted dashboard that consolidates information from multiple sources like RSS feeds, social media, and system monitoring tools into a single, accessible interface.
✨ Key Features: • Various widgets (RSS, Reddit, Hacker News, Weather, YouTube, Twitch, Market Prices, Docker status, Server stats, Custom) • Fast and lightweight with low memory usage and minimal dependencies
📖 Summary: Glance is a self-hosted, highly customizable dashboard designed to aggregate various feeds and information sources into a single, streamlined interface. It offers a fast, lightweight experience with low memory usage and a single binary for easy deployment, making it ideal for personal dashboards and monitoring.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
